title: "Pulling Them Out Of The Fire" Jude 22-23

notes.introduction: An exposition of Jude 22-23 on compassion and urgency in personal evangelism, developed through hymn histories, Old Testament narrative, and Pauline epistles to frame the believer's responsibility to share the gospel with the lost.

sections.heading: Hymn Stories: Rescue the Perishing and Throw Out the Lifeline
Context: Missions Conference and Local Responsibility
Point One: The Reality of Eternity
Point Two: The Responsibility to Evangelize
2 Kings 7: The Four Lepers and Holding Our Peace
Proverbs 24: Forbearing to Deliver and Making Excuses
Acts 20: Paul Pure from the Blood of All Men
